assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md explicitly states: 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (IMPRECISE -- no specific version threshold)' and 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (IMPRECISE -- no specific version provided)'. The Data Quality Assessment section confirms: 'The Jira description provides **imprecise** affected version information: "Affected versions: versions prior to the fix" -- no specific version threshold'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md Section 1 (MITRE CVE API) states: 'Source: https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901' and 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)'. It further specifies: 'The containers.cna.affected[0].versions[0] entry specifies: status: affected, lessThan: 0.4.8, versionType: semver'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md Section 2 (OSV.dev API) states: 'Source: https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901' and 'Fixed | 0.4.8'. It further specifies: 'The affected[0].ranges[0].events array shows: introduced: 0 (vulnerability present from the beginning), fixed: 0.4.8 (vulnerability resolved in this version)'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md Section 3 (Cross-Validation) states: 'MITRE and OSV.dev agree: both report the fix threshold as 0.4.8'. The Enriched Fix Threshold section concludes: '0.4.8 (from cross-validated MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev data). This enriched threshold will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons.' version-impact.md confirms usage: 'Using the cross-validated fix threshold from Step 1.5: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected (fix version: 0.4.8)'.

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md opens with: 'Using the cross-validated fix threshold from Step 1.5: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected (fix version: 0.4.8)'. All version comparisons use 0.4.8 as the threshold (e.g., '2.2.0 | 0.4.8 | NO | ships h2 0.4.8 (= fix threshold)', '2.1.0 | 0.4.5 | YES | ships h2 0.4.5 (< 0.4.8 fix threshold)'). The imprecise Jira description values ('versions prior to the fix', 'see advisory') are not used for any version comparison.
